notes.sg-climate-change-environmental-change: Keep as is, but note it's broader than just climate change.
notes.sg-remote-sensing-soil-moisture-and-remo: This topic is related to soil science and land remote sensing, not oceanography.
notes.sg-remote-sensing-geodetic-datum: This is a sub-topic of global positioning system.
notes.sg-remote-sensing-global-positioning-sys: The label 'global positioning' is too short. It should be 'global positioning system'.
notes.sg-sea-level-sea-level-rise: This is a core concept and is well-labeled.
notes.sg-sea-level-storm-surge: This is a distinct phenomenon related to sea level and well-labeled.
notes.sg-data-assimilation-atmospheric-infrare: This is a specific instrument, but it is representative of a class of instruments used for atmospheric sounding in data assimilation.
notes.sg-data-assimilation-climate-forecast-sy: The label 'climate forecast' is too generic. 'climate forecast system' is more specific and accurate.
notes.sg-environmental-resource-management-eco: More specific than 'ecosystem management' and distinct from 'ecosystem-based management'.
notes.sg-geology-paleoclimatology-calibration-: Pluralize for consistency with other terms.
notes.sg-oceanography-marine-marine-biology-an: This is a duplicate of 'marine biology'. The 'annual' qualifier is not specific enough to warrant a separate topic.
notes.sg-oceanography-marine-marine-biology: This is the canonical topic for marine biology.
